nl: All rules transitively superseded by the 2023 LTV rule.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?code WHERE { ?h al:ruleCode "LTV-2023" . ?h al:supersedes+ ?s . ?s al:ruleCode ?code . }

nl: All rules transitively superseded by the 2022 DTI rule.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?code WHERE { ?h al:ruleCode "DTI-2022" . ?h al:supersedes+ ?s . ?s al:ruleCode ?code . }

nl: Every (newer, older) pair of policy rules connected by the transitive supersedes relation.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?newer ?older WHERE { ?n al:ruleCode ?newer . ?n al:supersedes+ ?o . ?o al:ruleCode ?older . }

nl: Root (original) policy rules that supersede nothing.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?code WHERE { ?r a al:PolicyRule ; al:ruleCode ?code . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?r al:supersedes ?x . } }

nl: Head (current) policy rules that are not superseded by any other rule.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?code WHERE { ?r a al:PolicyRule ; al:ruleCode ?code . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?x al:supersedes ?r . } }

nl: Distinct policy rules that apply to the Northeast region.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?r WHERE { ?r a al:PolicyRule ; al:appliesToRegion ?reg . ?reg al:regionName "Northeast" . }

nl: Distinct policy rules that apply to the Southeast region.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?r WHERE { ?r a al:PolicyRule ; al:appliesToRegion ?reg . ?reg al:regionName "Southeast" . }

nl: Applications governed by a rule that applies to the Northeast region.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?app WHERE { ?app a al:Application ; al:governedBy ?r . ?r al:appliesToRegion ?reg . ?reg al:regionName "Northeast" . }

nl: Applications whose governing rule has been superseded by a newer rule (governed by stale policy).
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?app WHERE { ?app a al:Application ; al:governedBy ?r . ?newer al:supersedes+ ?r . }

nl: Borrowers who submitted an application located in the Northeast region.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?b WHERE { ?app a al:Application ; al:submittedBy ?b ; al:inRegion ?reg . ?reg al:regionName "Northeast" . }

nl: Decisions and every rule code transitively reachable (including itself) from the rule they were derived from.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?d ?code WHERE { ?d a al:Decision ; al:derivedFrom ?r . ?r al:supersedes* ?a . ?a al:ruleCode ?code . }

nl: Number of distinct policy rules per region (regions that have at least one rule).
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?reg (COUNT(DISTINCT ?r) AS ?n) WHERE { ?r a al:PolicyRule ; al:appliesToRegion ?reg . } GROUP BY ?reg

nl: Applications on collateral older than five years governed by a Southeast rule.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?app WHERE { ?app a al:Application ; al:hasCollateral ?v ; al:governedBy ?r . ?v al:vehicleAge ?age . FILTER(?age > 5) ?r al:appliesToRegion ?reg . ?reg al:regionName "Southeast" . }

nl: Co-borrowers (secondary borrowers) and their FICO band.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT ?cb ?band WHERE { ?cb a al:CoBorrower ; al:hasCreditProfile ?cp . ?cp al:ficoBand ?band . }

nl: Approved applications (decision outcome 'approved') in the Northeast region.
sparql:
PREFIX al: <https://autoloan-docintel.example/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?app WHERE { ?app a al:Application ; al:inRegion ?reg ; al:resultsIn ?d . ?reg al:regionName "Northeast" . ?d al:decisionOutcome "approved" . }
